title: HEM Lily of the Valley Incense Sticks – 6 Hex Tubes (120 Sticks Total) – Fresh Floral Aroma for Relaxation, Meditation & Home – with JRose Wooden Incense Holder
features: 🌸 Lily of the Valley Fragrance – A sweet, floral scent inspired by fresh spring blossoms
🕉️ Includes JRose Wooden Burner – Elegant, reusable holder for safe and stylish use
🧘 Perfect for Meditation & Yoga – Enhance your mindfulness and spiritual routines
🏠 Freshens Indoor Spaces – Eliminates stale odours and revitalises your home
🎁 Beautiful Gift Set – Ideal for incense lovers, spiritual gifting, or personal use
description: Immerse yourself in the delicate fragrance of Lily of the Valley with this premium incense set from HEM. Each stick releases a fresh, floral aroma that uplifts the senses and refreshes your space. Ideal for creating a calming atmosphere for meditation, yoga, prayer, or everyday relaxation. This pack includes 6 hexagonal tubes (approx. 120 sticks total) and a JRose wooden incense holder, combining tradition with elegance. Whether you're seeking spiritual ambiance, aromatherapy, or a thoughtful gift, this incense set is a perfect choice. HEM is a trusted name in incense, delivering premium fragrances for decades. Perfect for yoga, spiritual practices, or simply refreshing your living space.
